author: Chris T.
pros: Easy to setup different groups and policies, also mobile licenses included with no extra money.
cons: Not a lot of DLP capabilities in the cloud edition. Could have included more features and configurations.

description: very happy with cyber security settings, private network for banking is a bonus
author: Daniel P.
pros: Ease of set up as well as private network for banking
cons: there isn't much to dislike, the only thing is that renewal costs are not discounted enough

description: We have enjoyed some parts of this product but unfortunately have had issues with it truly keeping our endpoints secure. We are happy with the email protection portion of their package but would like a more robust endpoint protection service.
author: Aaron Y.
pros: It is a lightweight program and very easy to install and deploy. its email security has been very helpful in keeping out unwanted/malicious emails.
cons: It is not robust enough on its own to completely protect against malicious actors and can be disabled relatively easily on an endpoint to allow for compromise.

description: Works smoothly in daily use and quietly blocks threats without constant alerts. Trend Micro Apex One provides a solid endpoint protection with minimal performance impact. Easy to setup policies once set up, saving time for IT and users.
author: Vishal D.
pros: 1. Real-time threat detection is lightning fast and rarely misses new attack patterns. 2. The dashboard gives a clear view of network and endpoint health. 3. XDR solution is top notch and best in class.
cons: 1. Initial setup and configuration can feel a bit complex. 2. Support response time could be quicker for urgent issues. 3. Occasional system slowdowns

review_title: wide portfolio for close to all solutions
description: We adopt some product of the vendor, for local mail server, modern endpoints portection and legacy operating system; good overall solutions, but not the best of market.
author: Ilario M.
pros: Complete portfolio for every aspect and solution for cybersecurity protection
cons: Overall prices; products not always integrated in same vendor platforms

review_title: Comprehensive Protection with Room for Improvement
description: Overall experience is positive Trend micro seeking reliable, all encompassing cybersecurity protection with a user friendly interface. Its strong security capabilities and ease of use make it great choice for many individuals and families looking to stay safe online.
author: Snehal G.
pros: Trend micro is cybersecurity company that offers security software for networks, servers, and cloud computing environments. Comprehensive protection, Advanced AI Learning, Automated protection, Email security, Dark web and social media monitoring, User friendly, Industrial recognition, Global threat insights.
cons: While trend micro offers solid protection there are some aspects that users have mention as areas for improvement like Price, System Performance Impact, False positives, Limited VPN Features, Limited Customer support, Complex Settings for advance users.
author_profession: It Security and Risk Management Associate

review_title: All in one endpoint security with XDR capabilities
author: Paul Henry T.
pros: It is a cost-effective solution that has a lot of features and capabilities for its price.
cons: Nothing I dislike about the product. It is an excellent choice for security of endpoints.

description: Great support the few times I've reached out to them. Costs are exactly what I was looking for for something this full featured.
author: David R.
pros: Remote deployments, and a common portal to track definition updates. In years of use, it has yet to let a threat through. Quick and easy URL scanning and reporting allows me to see which workstations may be encountering threats before they make it to my network.
cons: The server AV doesn't configure quite as well as I'd like. Ended up not using it heavily and relying on other products for server protection when needed.

description: Great alternative antivirus and malware software. They have made improvements and keeping an eye on them and what the future holds for this company.
author: Manny P.
pros: Great Antivirus software if you dislike McAfee and Symantec. This software has a great removal suite for computers and servers that are infected. Helps you easily remove and restore your computer back to life.
cons: Although this product has saved me time, it's third on my list and wished that the software was more proactive in finding antivirus and malware that Malwarebytes easily picks up.

description: One of the best antivirus solutions for Enterprises.
author: Belmin K.
pros: Great Enterprise antivirus solution for any business.
cons: A bit strict with some restrictions, exceptions needed.

review_title: Ease of deployment and great value for money
description: Overall, the software is easy to use, the cloud platform is intuitive and the scanning engine appears to be robust as it has identified several threats even before they are downloaded to the computers by blocking sites, pop-ups and malware advertised via websites. We migrated from a different solution and we are happy with our decision so far. My recommendation is to evaluate the AV solution on a yearly basis as vendors are constantly improving their products to remain competitive in the market.
author: Jose A.
pros: The agent is easy to deploy and the cloud management portal facilitates support and maintenance for the product. It is an intuitive portal that does not require hours of training to operate. You can implement changes in the AV firewall, protection settings, etc. in a matter of minutes and simply push the updates to all the clients that report to the online cloud platform.
cons: When deploying the software via imaging process, it may take a few days before your desktop agents are able to report to the cloud portal. This could be a problem if you want to start managing the software as soon as an image is deployed. The only way to perform a quick reporting is by downloading the software directly on the computer and then install manually which could be time consuming. This is something that should be address by Trend Micro to facilitate deployment in the corporate environment.

review_title: I am very fond of Trend Micro Worry-Free Business Security Services.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about this software is that it works really well. Since we installed and started using Trend Micro we have been well protected. The admin console is easy to navigate and monitor. Getting device components loaded is easy. Tracking down any infection details is simple. Getting automatic alerts of irregular activity makes my job easier.
cons: One thing I do not like about Trend Micro is that I have had some difficulty in renewing the software. This may be because we need to go through a reseller, but I am not sure. The site could be set up better and have a clearly set path for renew. Also, I have had some issues accessing some of the pages on their site with certain browsers, the layout gets all weird. Not a big thing, just thought I would mention it.

review_title: Trend Micro has been a valuable and reasonable cost antivirus solution for our midsized office.
author: Jeff B.
pros: The client seems to be a minimal resource hog in comparison to other clients out there. Only see noticeable delays in my workstations over 5 years old (HP)
cons: Find client installation a bit more cumbersome then necessary and changing from one server to another can be a bit painful if you don't do all the legwork ahead of time.

review_title: Not the best Antivirus solution I have used But it gets the job done
author: Jamie S.
pros: Unattended installation works like a charm. Can access the portal from anywhere Easy to uninstall and reinstall. Support is great and easy to contact, also they speak good english.
cons: Scans can bog down slower computers and even fast computers can notice when scanning. Unable to apply policy changes to multiple groups. This can be a real hassle when whitelisting multiple folders in windows when you have many groups. There were months when windows 10 came out that the software would completely hose the computer when logging in and it tooks them a long time to find a solution. MAC installations don't always go smooth.

review_title: Some issues, but does the job well.
author: Dawn M.
pros: The program runs in the background with out cause interference most of the time. It catches a lot of the "nasty" stuff out their and leaves you feeling protected. Installation was also easy and straight forward.
cons: Old habits die hard and I prefer to use Internet Explorer , Trend and it did not get along causing issues with freezing or just exiting our of the browser.

review_title: Anti-Virus software that takes out computers in my network
description: Added protection to myself and my clients computers/network.
author: Thomas F.
pros: Helps to keep my clients computers safe. helps to block bad URLs, scans for viruses/ malware and helps to clear out infections. Admin panel allows for me to look through everything that was scanned that came up not clean.
cons: For awhile there was a bad update with Trend that would close out IE and not allow people to use it. The problem would cause it to crash in the middle of working on something and all the users would loss there progress.

author: Patrick H.
pros: We use Trend Worry Free business solutions and Hosted Email Security. Setup only took a matter of Minutes, Users were getting AV protection quickly and effectivly
cons: Customer Service. Like many it is outsourced to India and the language barrier is hard to deal with when talking about technical items.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: it is good to scan the PC and remove the virus and help in safe web search.
author: Zain U.
pros: it help the PC to protect it from virus and provide all info if any device is connected or disconnected to PC and it help in safe web search.
cons: in free mode it does not perform there best performance.

description: Overall, Trend Micro helped address any vulnerabilities with machines.
author: Andrew L.
pros: Trend Micro is a great antivirus, and one in which it is easy to understand the vulnerabilities and weaknesses that need to be addressed per machine.
cons: The feature that I liked least about the software was that the free packages didn't offer as much assistance in antivirus.

author: Daniel A.
pros: I liked Trend Micro for the internet security and protection that it provides.
cons: I have no unfavorable comments about this software.

review_title: Trend Micro is a nice antivirus product with some add ins that are very useful. Works well in busine
description: Very useful in antivirus and malware.
author: Marcus A.
pros: This software is pretty easy to use as and maneuver through. The cost is very economical for the price conscious.
cons: I dislike the protection add ins for Microsoft edge. The mode for games has to be manually enabled.

review_title: Lightweight but user interface needs an update
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It’s lightweight and works silently in the background, i.e. it does not bother you much with notifications.
cons: The interface is very outdated and not very user-friendly.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best anti virus software for onprem and cloud data base servers .easy installation and configuration both in windows and Linux servers .anti malware, Advanced threats protection. DDoS, phasing attacks ,vulnerability detection becomes easy.
cons: As of now we didn't find any drawbacks. We are expecting some more features

review_title: Say goodbye to potential security risks
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've been using Trend Micro for a few years now and have seen firsthand how it has helped me avoid potential security risks in my home. It has been the most reliable and trustworthy antivirus company I've ever used. I love that it updates on its own without me having to do anything and that it blocks everything from malware to phishing attempts. I haven't had any of these pop up on my phone since I installed Trend Micro!
cons: I haven't had any issues with it so far and I'm really happy with my choice.

description: Overall this has been a good product and offers similar protection as to what O365 CAS provides, but allows it to tie into XDR
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is very good at protecting Office365 hosted products such as Exchange, Sharepoint, and OneDrive.
cons: The downside to using this software is that it is very granular. It can take hours to fine-tune everything to make sure that it is not overly restrictive.
